title: Issue 2257 routed skill dependency closure

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

effects: Add registry-declared resource dependency identities and resolve them before ordinary skill recommendation.
Expose unavailable skills with stable blocked reasons instead of advertising them as executable.

next_action: Extend the shared dependency resolver into doctor, module/operation capability checks, and package-profile fixtures before issue closeout.
blockers: No blocker; this draft slice covers resource dependencies in catalog routing. Doctor and full lifecycle closure remain required before closing #2257.

claims: Issue 2257 routed skill dependency closure is implemented, validated, and closed out honestly.

continuation.residual_intent: Add doctor consumption, module/operation dependencies, package-profile closure fixtures, and build-time registry validation before issue closure.
